case_title: SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. VS JUPITER ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $733.50 FILED BY SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUPITER ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUPITER ENTERPRISES INC. $733.50 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JUPITER ENTERPRISES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUPITER ENTERPRISES INC.
